desc: Beautiful Ascot Model in Orchard Crossing. 4 bedrooms, 1-car garage, quiet cul-de-sac. Newer ceramic floors, updated granite kitchen. Great location near shopping and NYC bus.
description:
Beautiful Ascot Model townhouse in the sought-after Orchard Crossing community of Holmdel. This 4-bedroom home sits on a quiet cul-de-sac and offers a 1-car garage.

The home features newer ceramic tile floors and an updated granite kitchen. Orchard Crossing offers a well-maintained community setting in one of Monmouth County's most desirable towns — close to Holmdel shopping, parks, and NYC bus service.
